form.formComment: Solid performance to win by 5 lengths at this track over 366m (20.10) beating Hara's Loki in Maiden on February 8. Strong form emerging from the that last run. Leading chance.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (26.08) at Q Lakeside in a Grade 6, finishing sixth and beaten 7 lengths. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and two minors. Has ability and looks a key chance.

form.formComment: Backs up after winning by 1.5 lengths at this track (20.15) beating Motion Activated in a Maiden on April 15 four days ago. Likely to find this a lot tougher and he needs to find another gear.
